grammar_points.name: 不仅...也/还/而且... (Not Only... But Also...)
grammar_points.explanation: 连词'不仅'用在第一个分句里，第二个分句常用'也/还/而且'呼应，表示递进关系。两个分句主语相同时，'不仅'在主语后；主语不同时，'不仅'在主语前。

examples.chinese: 他不仅足球踢得好，性格也不错。
examples.pinyin: Tā bùjǐn zuúqiú tī de hǎo, xìnggé yě búcuò.
examples.english: Not only does he play football well, but he also has a good personality.

examples.chinese: 那里不仅风景很美，而且人也非常热情。
examples.pinyin: Nàlǐ bùjǐn fēngjǐng hěn měi, érqiě rén yě fēicháng rèqíng.
examples.english: Not only is the scenery beautiful there, but the people are also very warm.

examples.chinese: 这个城市不仅历史悠久，还有许多名胜古迹。
examples.pinyin: Zhège chéngshì bùjǐn lìshǐ yōujiǔ, hái yǒu xǔduō míngshèng gǔjì.
examples.english: This city not only has a long history but also many famous historical sites.

grammar_points.name: "从来" (Always/All Along)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'从来'表示从过去到现在都是这样，多用于否定句中，如'从来不'、'从来没'。

examples.pinyin: Tā kāihuì cónglái bù chídào.
examples.english: He never arrives late to meetings.

examples.chinese: 我从来没去过那个地方。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ cónglái méi qù guo nàge dìfang.
examples.english: I've never been to that place.

examples.pinyin: Tā cónglái dōu shuō zhēnhuà.
examples.english: He always tells the truth.

grammar_points.name: "刚" (Just)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'刚'表示动作或情况发生在不久以前，用于主语后、动词前。

examples.chinese: 我上午刚借的那本书，怎么不见了？
examples.pinyin: Wǒ shàngwǔ gāng jiè de nà běn shū, zěnme bú jiàn le?
examples.english: The book I just borrowed this morning, how come it's missing?

examples.pinyin: Tā gāng cóng huìyìshì guòlái.
examples.english: He just came from the meeting room.

examples.chinese: 我们刚认识的时候，话不多。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen gāng rènshi de shíhou, huà bù duō.
examples.english: When we first met, we didn't talk much.

grammar_points.name: "有的...，有的..." (Some... Others...)
grammar_points.explanation: '有的'用于列举，表示一部分人或事物。

examples.chinese: 同学们有的在看书，有的在写字。
examples.pinyin: Tóngxuémen yǒude zài kànshū, yǒude zài xiězì.
examples.english: Some students are reading, others are writing.

examples.chinese: 公园里的人，有的在跑步，有的在跳舞。
examples.pinyin: Gōngyuán lǐ de rén, yǒude zài pǎobù, yǒude zài tiàowǔ.
examples.english: In the park, some people are running, others are dancing.

grammar_points.name: 存现句 (Existential Sentences)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示某处存在、出现或消失了某人或某物。结构：处所词 + 动词 + 名词。

examples.pinyin: Zhuōzi shang fàng zhe yì běn shū.
examples.english: There is a book on the table.

examples.pinyin: Qiánmian zǒulái yí ge rén.
examples.english: A person is walking towards us.

examples.pinyin: Jiālǐ lái le kèren.
examples.english: Guests have arrived at home.

grammar_points.name: "把"字句的扩展 (Extended Ba-Sentences)
grammar_points.explanation: 把字句的更多用法，强调动作对对象的影响或处置结果。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ qiánbāo wàng zài jiālǐ le.
examples.english: I left my wallet at home.

examples.chinese: 请把你的名字写在这里。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng bǎ nǐ de míngzi xiě zài zhèlǐ.
examples.english: Please write your name here.

examples.pinyin: Tā bǎ nà jiàn shì gàosu le wǒ.
examples.english: He told me about that matter.

grammar_points.name: "不得不" (Have To/Cannot Help But)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示因某种原因而不得不做某事。

examples.chinese: 因为没车了，他不得不走路回家。
examples.pinyin: Yīnwèi méi chē le, tā bùdébù zǒulù huíjiā.
examples.english: Because there were no more buses, he had to walk home.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ bùdébù chéngrèn wǒ cuò le.
examples.english: I have to admit I was wrong.

title: 收到你的信我非常高兴

grammar_points.name: 结果补语扩展 (Extended Complements of Result)
grammar_points.explanation: 更多的结果补语用法，如'完、好、到、见、懂'等。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ kànwán le zhè běn shū.
examples.english: I finished reading this book.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ méi tīngdǒng tā de huà.
examples.english: I didn't understand what he said.

examples.pinyin: Tā shōudào le wǒ de xìn.
examples.english: He received my letter.

grammar_points.name: "原来" (It Turns Out/Originally)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示发现真实情况，或者表示原来的状态。

examples.chinese: 原来是你啊！我都没认出来。
examples.pinyin: Yuánlái shì nǐ a! Wǒ dōu méi rèn chūlái.
examples.english: It turns out it's you! I didn't recognize you.

examples.pinyin: Yuánlái zhèlǐ shì yí piàn shùlín.
examples.english: Originally this was a forest.

grammar_points.name: 动态助词"过" (Particle '过' for Experiences)
grammar_points.explanation: '过'表示过去的经历，强调曾经有过某种经验。

examples.pinyin: Nǐ kàn guo jīngjù ma?
examples.english: Have you ever seen Peking Opera?

examples.pinyin: Wǒ qù guo yí cì Běijīng.
examples.english: I've been to Beijing once.

examples.pinyin: Tā cónglái méi chī guo Zhōngguó cài.
examples.english: He's never eaten Chinese food.

grammar_points.name: "倒是" (Actually/On the Contrary)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示转折，引出与预期相反的情况。

examples.pinyin: Zhège fāngfǎ dàoshì hěn jiǎndān.
examples.english: This method is actually quite simple.

examples.chinese: 我倒是想去，但是没时间。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ dàoshì xiǎng qù, dànshì méi shíjiān.
examples.english: I do want to go, but I don't have time.

grammar_points.name: "着"的用法 (Usage of '着')
grammar_points.explanation: 助词'着'表示动作或状态的持续。

examples.pinyin: Ménkǒu zhàn zhe yí ge rén.
examples.english: There is a person standing at the door.

examples.pinyin: Tā zhèngzài kàn zhe shū ne.
examples.english: He is reading a book right now.

examples.pinyin: Mén kāi zhe, nǐ kěyǐ jìnqù.
examples.english: The door is open, you can go in.

grammar_points.name: "在"和"正在" (Comparison of '在' and '正在')
grammar_points.explanation: '在'和'正在'都表示动作正在进行，'正在'更强调动作的进行状态。

examples.pinyin: Tā zài chīfàn.
examples.english: He is eating.

examples.pinyin: Tā zhèngzài kāihuì, qǐng shāo děng.
examples.english: He is in a meeting, please wait a moment.

grammar_points.name: 连动句 (Sentences with Serial Verbs)
grammar_points.explanation: 一个句子中有两个或多个动词短语，表示连续发生的动作或同时进行的活动。

examples.pinyin: Wǒmen qí zìxíngchē qù gōngyuán.
examples.english: We ride bicycles to the park.

examples.pinyin: Tā qù chāoshì mǎi cài.
examples.english: He goes to the supermarket to buy vegetables.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ zuò fēijī qù Běijīng chūchāi.
examples.english: I'm taking a plane to Beijing for a business trip.

grammar_points.name: "顺便" (Conveniently/On the Way)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示做某事时顺便做另一件事。

examples.chinese: 我去超市买东西，顺便帮你买点水果。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxi, shùnbiàn bāng nǐ mǎi diǎn shuǐguǒ.
examples.english: I'm going to the supermarket to buy things, I'll get some fruit for you too.

examples.chinese: 你回家的时候顺便把这封信寄了。
examples.pinyin: Nǐ huíjiā de shíhou shùnbiàn bǎ zhè fēng xìn jì le.
examples.english: Mail this letter on your way home.

grammar_points.name: 比较句的扩展 (Extended Comparative Sentences)
grammar_points.explanation: 更复杂的比较句，包括'A比B更+形容词'、'A没有B那么+形容词'等。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ bǐ nǐ gèng xǐhuan páshān.
examples.english: I like hiking more than you do.

examples.pinyin: Jīntiān méiyǒu zuótiān nàme lěng.
examples.english: Today is not as cold as yesterday.

examples.chinese: 他的汉语说得跟我一样好。
examples.pinyin: Tā de Hànyǔ shuō de gēn wǒ yíyàng hǎo.
examples.english: He speaks Chinese as well as I do.

grammar_points.name: "更"和"最" (Comparison of '更' and '最')
grammar_points.explanation: '更'表示程度更深，用于两者比较；'最'表示最高程度，用于三者及以上比较。

examples.chinese: 这件衣服比那件更漂亮。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiàn yīfu bǐ nà jiàn gèng piàoliang.
examples.english: This dress is more beautiful than that one.

examples.chinese: 他是我们班里最高的学生。
examples.pinyin: Tā shì wǒmen bān lǐ zuì gāo de xuésheng.
examples.english: He is the tallest student in our class.

grammar_points.name: "过"与"了"的比较 (Comparison of '过' and '了')
grammar_points.explanation: '过'强调经历，'了'强调完成。

examples.chinese: 我看过那部电影。（有这种经历）
examples.pinyin: Wǒ kàn guo nà bù diànyǐng.
examples.english: I have seen that movie. (experience)

examples.chinese: 我看了那部电影。（完成了这件事）
examples.pinyin: Wǒ kàn le nà bù diànyǐng.
examples.english: I watched that movie. (completed action)

examples.pinyin: Nǐ qù guo Chángchéng ma?
examples.english: Have you been to the Great Wall?

grammar_points.name: "又"的多种用法 (Various Usages of '又')
grammar_points.explanation: '又'可以表示重复、同时具有两种性质、或强调。

examples.pinyin: Tā yòu chídào le.
examples.english: He was late again.

examples.pinyin: Zhège píngguǒ yòu dà yòu tián.
examples.english: This apple is both big and sweet.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ yòu búshì nǐ de lǎoshī.
examples.english: I'm not your teacher, you know.

grammar_points.name: 趋向补语的引申义 (Extended Meanings of Directional Complements)
grammar_points.explanation: '起来'可以表示开始、估计、评价等引申义。

examples.pinyin: Tiānqì rè qǐlái le.
examples.english: The weather is getting hot.

examples.pinyin: Zhège kàn qǐlái hěn hǎochī.
examples.english: This looks delicious.

examples.pinyin: Shuō qǐlái róngyì, zuò qǐlái nán.
examples.english: It's easier said than done.

grammar_points.name: "过去" (Go Over)
grammar_points.explanation: '过去'可以表示空间上的移动，也可以表示时间上的过去。

examples.pinyin: Wǒmen guòqù bāngbang tāmen.
examples.english: Let's go over and help them.

examples.chinese: 事情已经过去了，别再想了。
examples.pinyin: Shìqing yǐjīng guòqù le, bié zài xiǎng le.
examples.english: It's all in the past, don't think about it anymore.

grammar_points.name: 存现句详解 (Detailed Existential Sentences)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示某处存在、出现或消失某人或某物。结构：地点 + 动词 + 着/了 + 名词。

examples.pinyin: Zhuōzi shang fàng zhe hěn duō yǐnliào.
examples.english: There are many drinks on the table.

examples.pinyin: Qiáng shang guà zhe yì zhāng huà.
examples.english: There is a painting hanging on the wall.

examples.pinyin: Zuótiān lái le hěn duō kèren.
examples.english: Many guests came yesterday.

grammar_points.name: "多"和"少" (Many and Few)
grammar_points.explanation: '多'和'少'可以作形容词或副词，表示数量。

examples.pinyin: Zhèlǐ rén hěn duō.
examples.english: There are many people here.

examples.pinyin: Qǐng duō shuō jǐ jù.
examples.english: Please say a few more words.

examples.pinyin: Shǎo hē diǎn jiǔ.
examples.english: Drink less alcohol.

grammar_points.name: 动词重叠 (Verb Reduplication)
grammar_points.explanation: 单音节动词重叠为AA式，双音节动词重叠为ABAB式，表示动作短暂、尝试或轻松。

examples.pinyin: Nǐ kànkan zhè běn shū.
examples.english: Take a look at this book.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xiūxi xiūxi.
examples.english: I want to take a rest.

examples.chinese: 我们讨论讨论这个问题。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen tǎolùn tǎolùn zhège wèntí.
examples.english: Let's discuss this problem.

grammar_points.name: "一下" (A Bit/Briefly)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词 + 一下 表示动作短暂或轻松。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ wèn yíxià.
examples.english: Let me ask briefly.

examples.pinyin: Qǐng nǐ děng yíxià.
examples.english: Please wait a moment.

examples.pinyin: Ràng wǒ kàn yíxià.
examples.english: Let me have a look.

grammar_points.name: 量词重叠 (Classifier Reduplication)
grammar_points.explanation: 量词重叠表示'每一'的意思，强调全部。

examples.pinyin: Gège dōu hěn piàoliang.
examples.english: Every one is beautiful.

examples.pinyin: Rénrén dōu zhīdào zhè jiàn shì.
examples.english: Everyone knows about this.

examples.pinyin: Jiànjiàn dōu hǎo.
examples.english: Every piece is good.

grammar_points.name: "的"字短语 (De-Phrases)
grammar_points.explanation: 形容词/动词 + 的 + 名词 构成的短语。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yí jiàn hóngsè de.
examples.english: I want to buy a red one.

examples.pinyin: Chī de shì Zhōngguó cài.
examples.english: What we're eating is Chinese food.

examples.chinese: 穿黑衣服的那个人是我哥哥。
examples.pinyin: Chuān hēi yīfu de nà ge rén shì wǒ gēge.
examples.english: The person in black is my brother.

grammar_points.name: "一点儿"和"有一点儿" (Comparison of '一点儿' and '有一点儿')
grammar_points.explanation: '一点儿'用在形容词后表示程度或比较，'有一点儿'用在形容词前表示轻微的程度。

examples.pinyin: Zhè jiàn yīfu dà le yìdiǎnr.
examples.english: This dress is a bit too big.

examples.pinyin: Jīntiān yǒu yìdiǎnr lěng.
examples.english: It's a bit cold today.

examples.pinyin: Háishì piányi yìdiǎnr hǎo.
examples.english: It's better to be a bit cheaper.

grammar_points.name: "还是...好" (Had Better)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示经过比较后认为某个选择更好。

examples.pinyin: Háishì zuò huǒchē qù hǎo.
examples.english: It's better to go by train.

examples.pinyin: Háishì zǎo diǎnr qù hǎo.
examples.english: It's better to go early.

grammar_points.name: 程度补语扩展 (Extended Complements of Degree)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词/形容词 + 得 + 很/真/太... 表示程度。

examples.pinyin: Nǐ de Hànyǔ shuō de zhēn búcuò.
examples.english: You speak Chinese really well.

examples.pinyin: Tā pǎo de hěn kuài.
examples.english: He runs very fast.

examples.pinyin: Tā gāoxìng de tiào le qǐlái.
examples.english: She was so happy she jumped up.

grammar_points.name: "真"和"很" (Comparison of '真' and '很')
grammar_points.explanation: '真'表示赞叹或惊讶，'很'是一般程度的表示。

examples.pinyin: Nǐ zhēn cōngming!
examples.english: You're so smart!

examples.pinyin: Tā hěn cōngming.
examples.english: He is very smart.

examples.pinyin: Zhèlǐ zhēn měi!
examples.english: This place is so beautiful!

title: 这个地方跟我想的不一样

grammar_points.name: "跟...一样/不一样" (Same As/Different From)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示两者相同或不同。

examples.chinese: 这个地方跟我想的不一样。
examples.pinyin: Zhège dìfang gēn wǒ xiǎng de bù yíyàng.
examples.english: This place is different from what I imagined.

examples.pinyin: Tā de xiǎngfǎ gēn wǒ yíyàng.
examples.english: His idea is the same as mine.

examples.chinese: 这里的天气跟南方不一样。
examples.pinyin: Zhèlǐ de tiānqì gēn nánfāng bù yíyàng.
examples.english: The weather here is different from the south.

grammar_points.name: "按" (According To)
grammar_points.explanation: 介词，表示依据或按照。

examples.pinyin: Àn nǐ shuō de zuò.
examples.english: Do as you say.

examples.pinyin: Ànshí wánchéng zuòyè.
examples.english: Finish homework on time.

examples.pinyin: Àn jìhuà jìnxíng.
examples.english: Proceed according to plan.

grammar_points.name: 疑问代词的非疑问用法 (Non-Interrogative Uses of Interrogative Pronouns)
grammar_points.explanation: 疑问代词可以表示任指或虚指。

examples.chinese: 谁都不知道他去哪儿了。
examples.pinyin: Shéi dōu bù zhīdào tā qù nǎr le.
examples.english: No one knows where he went.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng chī shénme jiù chī shénme.
examples.english: I eat whatever I want.

examples.pinyin: Nǎr yě méi qù.
examples.english: Didn't go anywhere.

grammar_points.name: "什么的" (And So On)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示列举未尽。

examples.chinese: 他喜欢打篮球、踢足球什么的。
examples.pinyin: Tā xǐhuan dǎ lánqiú, tī zuúqiú shénme de.
examples.english: He likes playing basketball, football, and so on.

examples.chinese: 家里有苹果、香蕉什么的。
examples.pinyin: Jiālǐ yǒu píngguǒ, xiāngjiāo shénme de.
examples.english: There are apples, bananas, and so on at home.

grammar_points.name: "听说"和"据说" (Hear/It Is Said)
grammar_points.explanation: '听说'是听别人说，'据说'是根据传说或报道。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ tīngshuō nǐ zuìjìn hěn máng.
examples.english: I heard you've been very busy lately.

examples.pinyin: Jùshuō zhège dìfang hěn měi.
examples.english: It is said that this place is very beautiful.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ tīngshuō míngtiān yào xiàyǔ.
examples.english: I heard it's going to rain tomorrow.

grammar_points.name: "最近" (Recently)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示不久过去的一段时间或不久将来的时间。

examples.pinyin: Zuìjìn tā gōngzuò hěn máng.
examples.english: He's been very busy at work recently.

examples.pinyin: Zuìjìn yǒu shénme xīnwén ma?
examples.english: Is there any news recently?

examples.pinyin: Zuìjìn wǒ bú tài shūfu.
examples.english: I haven't been feeling well recently.

grammar_points.name: "即使...也..." (Even If... Still...)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示假设的让步，即使条件成立，结果也不会改变。

examples.pinyin: Jíshǐ xiàyǔ wǒ yě yào qù.
examples.english: Even if it rains, I will still go.

examples.chinese: 即使很累，他也要坚持工作。
examples.pinyin: Jíshǐ hěn lèi, tā yě yào jiānchí gōngzuò.
examples.english: Even if he's tired, he still keeps working.

examples.chinese: 即使失败了，也不要放弃。
examples.pinyin: Jíshǐ shībài le, yě bú yào fàngqì.
examples.english: Even if you fail, don't give up.

grammar_points.name: "无论...都..." (No Matter... All...)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示在任何条件下结果都不变。

examples.chinese: 无论多晚，他都要等她回来。
examples.pinyin: Wúlùn duō wǎn, tā dōu yào děng tā huílái.
examples.english: No matter how late, he will wait for her to come back.

examples.chinese: 无论你去哪儿，我都陪着你。
examples.pinyin: Wúlùn nǐ qù nǎr, wǒ dōu péi zhe nǐ.
examples.english: No matter where you go, I'll be with you.

title: 除了太极拳以外，我还学会了跳舞

grammar_points.name: "除了...以外，还/也/都..." (Besides... Also/All...)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示添加或排除。

examples.chinese: 除了太极拳以外，我还学会了跳舞。
examples.pinyin: Chúle tàijíquán yǐwài, wǒ hái xuéhuì le tiàowǔ.
examples.english: Besides Tai Chi, I also learned to dance.

examples.chinese: 除了他以外，大家都同意了。
examples.pinyin: Chúle tā yǐwài, dàjiā dōu tóngyì le.
examples.english: Except for him, everyone agreed.

examples.chinese: 除了中文，他还会说英语和日语。
examples.pinyin: Chúle Zhōngwén, tā hái huì shuō Yīngyǔ hé Rìyǔ.
examples.english: Besides Chinese, he can also speak English and Japanese.

grammar_points.name: "或者"和"还是" (Comparison of '或者' and '还是')
grammar_points.explanation: '或者'用于陈述句，'还是'用于疑问句。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng hē kāfēi huòzhě chá.
examples.english: I want to drink coffee or tea.

examples.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng hē kāfēi háishì chá?
examples.english: Do you want to drink coffee or tea?

examples.chinese: 你可以选择去或者不去。
examples.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ xuǎnzé qù huòzhě bú qù.
examples.english: You can choose to go or not to go.
